chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-955 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 4035/23 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 4036/23 4.For orders on CMA 4037/23 5.For hearing of main case 13-06-2023 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioners. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, as the petitioners intend to approach the Circuit of this Court at Hyderabad for redress of his grievance. Accordingly, this petition along with listed applications stands dismissed as not pressed leaving the petitioners are liberty to avail the remedy before the Circuit of this Court at Hyderabad, as they desire so and if permissible under the law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
